Music YoYo Sitar — Solo Afro-Desi Raga Voice Sound Journey About Contact Press Kit

YoYo Sitar — Solo

Contemporary Sitar Performance A modern sitar performance rooted in Indian raga and live improvisation, moving from deep meditative stillness to driving rhythmic intensity. An immersive, emotionally charged concert experience adaptable to intimate venues or large festival stages.

Formats: Solo · Duo (with percussion/tabla) · Expanded festival ensemble

﻿
